return(function(d,F,V,n,g,P,I,b,J,x,q,X,c,k,t,U,S,K,G,p,T)T,t,G,q,S,U,x,k,X,J,K,b,c,p=function(d,L)local F=b(L)local V=function(...)return U(d,{...},L,F)end return V
